outlook.summary: Spot at 6528 is ~10% above gamma flip zone, indicating dealer long gamma positioning. Monthly shows extreme bullish sentiment (PCR 0.03, reverse smirk) suggesting potential overextension. ITM call concentrations at 6300-6410 act as downside magnets. No visible resistance above spot - path of least resistance remains higher with pullbacks contained by magnetic strikes.

Highest 0DTE OI concentration (70) creates intraday magnetic attraction. Day traders should monitor for pin risk at expiration.
Structural gamma equilibrium across all expiries (0DTE: 5880, WEEKLY: 5900, MONTHLY: 5880). Spot ~10% above = dealers long gamma = volatility suppression. Critical support if breached.
